payload.label: outlet
payload.long_description: Blurry, low-resolution close-up of a vertical white plastic electrical outlet/faceplate resembling a GFCI module with a centered rectangular receptacle and small printed buttons/text; plate is wall-mounted, appears slightly edge-cropped on the left, and is approximately 0.5 m from the camera.
